trajectory.description: Fix the Conv2d channel mismatch. SB3 MultiInputPolicy preprocesses image obs by transposing to CHW only if the obs space is declared as image (3D with channels). Since Minigrid image is (7,7,3), SB3 may not auto-transpose. I'll fix the feature extractor to handle the actual input format, or better yet use a simpler flat MLP approach that's more robust. Training 5M steps with 40 envs.

trajectory.description: Observation: Tensor dimension mismatch between img_features (2D) and dir_features (3D). Analysis: SB3 preprocesses direction as float tensor, possibly with extra dim. The Embedding expects integer input but gets float. Decision: Replace embedding with a simple linear layer for direction, and squeeze any extra dimensions.

trajectory.description: Observation: Direction is one-hot encoded by SB3 to shape (B, 4), but Linear(1, 16) expects (B, 1). Analysis: SB3 MultiInputPolicy one-hot encodes Discrete spaces. Decision: Fix Linear to accept 4 inputs. Train 5M steps and submit eval.
